header.title: Publish Dataset
header.subtitle: Connect your API to the ProcureData ecosystem

alerts.maintenance: Scheduled maintenance in progress. Dataset publishing is temporarily disabled.
alerts.securityNote: ProcureData does not store your data. We only facilitate the secure connection between your API and the authorised consumer.

demo.title: Feature not available
demo.description: Asset publishing is not available in demo mode.

step1.title: Step 1: Data Source (API)
step1.description: Define the endpoint and authentication of your data source

originDescription.label: Source Description
originDescription.placeholder: Briefly describe the source of this data...

apiUrl.label: API URL *
apiUrl.hint: GET endpoint from which authorised consumers will receive the data

headers.label: Custom Headers
headers.hint: Headers are stored securely and sent only during authorised calls

step2.title: Step 2: Technical Data Schema
step2.description: Define the structure consumers will see when querying your API

assistant.label: Schema Assistant
assistant.description: Upload a sample JSON or CSV file and we'll detect the fields automatically. You can also define them manually.

validation.minOneField: Define at least one field in the schema

fileErrors.parseError: Could not process the file. Please check the format.
fileErrors.noFields: No fields detected in the file.

step3.title: Step 3: Pontus-X Access Policies
step3.description: Define governance rules and usage conditions for your dataset

permissions.heading: Permissions — What the user CAN do

prohibitions.heading: Prohibitions — What the user CANNOT do

termsUrl.label: Terms & Conditions Link (Optional)
termsUrl.hint: Enter a resolvable URL to your legal T&C document

accessControl.heading: Access Control (Pontus-X)
accessControl.whitelistHint: If you add organisations here, the asset becomes PRIVATE.
accessControl.blacklistHint: These organisations will not be able to view or request the asset.

step4.title: Step 4: Marketplace Publication
step4.description: Define how your dataset will appear in the catalogue

descriptionField.label: Description
descriptionField.placeholder: Describe the content, sources and utility of the data...

pricing.title: Pricing Model
pricing.description: Define how you want to monetise your data

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.description: Accept the conditions to publish on the marketplace
terms.acceptTerms: I accept ProcureData's Terms and Conditions
terms.acceptTermsDesc: Including the obligations as a data provider and the marketplace usage policies.
terms.acceptDataPolicy: I confirm that I have the right to share this data
terms.acceptDataPolicyDesc: I declare that the data complies with GDPR and does not contain personal information without consent.

validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and data policy
validation.maintenanceMode: System under maintenance. Publishing is temporarily disabled.

step4.successAutoApprove: Dataset successfully published in the catalogue.
step4.successReview: Dataset submitted for technical review. You will be notified when it is available in the catalogue.

accessTimeout.title: Service Expiry (Timeout)
accessTimeout.description: Define how long the consumer can access the data before their licence expires.
accessTimeout.defaultHint: Default value: 90 days. Consumers will see this period in the usage licence.

accessControl.whitelistHintLong: If you add organisations here, the asset becomes PRIVATE. Only they will be able to view and request it. The denied list will be automatically ignored.
accessControl.blacklistHintLong: Only effective if the allowed list is empty. The asset will be PUBLIC for everyone, except for the organisations listed here.
accessControl.blacklistDisabledWarning: The whitelist takes priority. This section is ignored while there are organisations in the allowed list.
accessControl.emptyWhitelist: No organisations added — the asset will not be private by whitelist.
accessControl.emptyBlacklist: No organisations denied — full public access.
accessControl.termsUrlError: The T&C URL is not valid
